overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a white coat walking through a dimly lit industrial spaceship corridor, entering a private living quarters room, examining the interior, and exiting back to the corridor.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow industrial corridor past yellow benches and metal lockers

entered.detail: industrial yellow and black padded seating along corridor walls
grey metal wall panels with industrial texture and vents
long fluorescent tube lights mounted on ceiling
small brown tables positioned between bench seats

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow, industrial corridor illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights. Yellow padded benches line both sides of the metal-grated floor, with small wooden tables positioned between them.

events.description: approaching and entering the doorway marked LIVING QUARTERS 2

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway into the residential quarters area

entered.detail: illuminated orange text sign reading LIVING QUARTERS 2 above doorway
metal doorway frame leading into the private quarters
stacked grey and yellow storage containers near entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the illuminated sign for Living Quarters 2 and enters through the metal doorway. Storage crates are stacked near the entrance as the scene transitions from the main corridor into the private room.

scene_state.functional_zone: small personal quarters with sleeping area

events.description: character turns to examine the bed and surrounding shelves in the room

agents.ego_description: examining the room interior, looking at the bed, shelves, and personal items

entered.detail: built-in bed with dark mattress and crumpled green sheets
white metal shelving unit with storage bins
small desk with electronic equipment and personal items
shelves mounted above the bed with various items

segments.scene_description: Inside the compact living quarters, the character explores the space containing a bed with green sheets, metal shelving units, and a small desk. The lighting is dimmer than the corridor, creating an intimate atmosphere.

events.description: exiting the living quarters back into the main corridor

agents.ego_description: leaving the room and returning to the main corridor

entered.detail: yellow and black padded benches visible upon returning to corridor
fluorescent lights of the main corridor ahead

segments.scene_description: The character exits the living quarters, passing back through the doorway into the main corridor. The yellow benches and fluorescent lighting of the industrial hallway become visible again as the character leaves the private room behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile industrial corridor into a dim private living space and back again. It begins by following a character in a white coat down a narrow hallway lined with yellow padded benches and metal-grated flooring under bright fluorescent lights. As the character approaches an illuminated sign for Living Quarters 2, the camera glides through a metal doorway past stacked storage crates and into a compact room. The environment shifts to a dimmer, more intimate atmosphere as the camera explores a small interior containing a bed with green sheets, metal shelving, and a desk. Finally, the scene transitions back through the doorway, returning to the bright, industrial expanse of the main corridor and its repeating yellow benches.
